message.thinking:
We need to answer 3 questions: Chapters, Description, Structure. Provide JSON array with three objects. Each object has keys: "question" with string value: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". "feedback" is textual info highlighting problems or strengths. "complies" boolean.

Given text: It's introduction section. No chapters list. So for Chapters: does the text list the main sections of the thesis? No. So feedback: no list. Complies false.

Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text only mentions the problem and relevance. It does not describe each section. So fails. Complies false.

Structure: Can it be easily understood what general structure of thesis just from this text? The text is introduction only, not giving structure. So fails. Complies false.

Provide array with three objects. Ensure JSON valid. No extra text.
